title: fix: update playground app key
author: ElliotEtag
pr_body_excerpt:
- Updates the standalone Playground app publishable key to `pk_YKOUHB80IUJYfwCB`.

Checks:
- `PATH=/opt/homebrew/bin:$PATH npx biome check --write apps/playground/src/config.ts`
- `PATH=/opt/homebrew/bin:$PATH npm run build --prefix apps/playground`

gist.headline: New keys for the playground
gist.blurb: Swapped out the publishable key for the standalone Playground app. Just routine maintenance to keep the sand in the sandbox.
gist.summary: Updated the publishable key for the standalone Playground app to pk_YKOUHB80IUJYfwCB.
gist.impact: Ensures the Playground app continues to authenticate and function correctly without interruption.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee holding a shiny new golden key next to a digital sandbox or playground equipment made of glowing code blocks.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee mascot wearing a tiny tool belt, holding a glowing golden key next to a digital sandbox made of lime green (#ecf874) code blocks. Soft pastel gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
